song.title: One With Thee
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C V6 C
song.lyrics: [v1] I am one with Thee, Lord Jesus, One in spirit now with Thee; All Thyself I now possess, Lord, All Thou art now lives in me. [c] One with Thee, one with Thee, One with Thee, one with Thee; Day by by day I share Thy riches, Thou art everything to me. [v2] Now I share Thy human life, Lord. Filled with Thy humanity, All of Thy complete obedience Is available to me. [v3] One with Thee in crucifixion, On the cross I died in Thee; I am dead unto the world, Lord, And the world is dead to me. [v4] One with Thee in resurrection, Risen now to live in Thee, With that life which is Thyself, Lord, Now in me, Lord, even me. [v5] One with Thee in Thine ascension, In the heavens now with Thee; Here a pilgrim and a stranger, My true life is hid in Thee. [v6] One with Thee in Thine enthronement, Sharing Thine authority, Even as I share Thy life, Lord, I in Thee and Thou in me.
